title: Force Transition (Admin) — Process Flow
content:
start([START: Admin selects force transition
POST /api/v1/admin/actions/id/force-transition
Body: to_state, reason
reason required, minimum 50 characters])
s2[2. Load action with current state]

s3[3. Skip ALL guard evaluations
No evidence check, no RCA check,
no consultation check
Transition is unconditional]

s4[4. Update action state to target state
UPDATE actions.actions
SET state=to_state, version=version+1]

s5[5. Record ActionStateHistory with force_transition=true
INSERT actions.action_state_history
action_id, from_state, to_state,
changed_by=admin_id,
force_transition=true, reason]

s6[6. Record ActionAuditEvent with admin actor and bypass reason
INSERT actions.action_audit_events
action_id, event_type='state.force_transitioned',
actor_id=admin_id,
details from_state, to_state, reason,
guards_bypassed=true]
s7[7. Return 200 OK with updated action DTO]
